# Sanmora Technologies

> https://sanmora.in

Sanmora Technologies is a premium web development, visual design, and software engineering agency based in Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India. Sanmora specializes in building high-speed, secure, and SEO-optimized custom web applications, SaaS platforms, headless e-commerce storefronts, and native/cross-platform mobile applications.

## Core Capabilities & Services

### Website Development
*   **Static Websites (SSG):** Ultra-fast, CDN-cached landing pages built using Next.js and Tailwind CSS.
*   **Dynamic Web Portals (SSR):** Full-stack React/Node.js databases featuring secure authorization, live panels, and workflows.
*   **Headless E-Commerce:** High-conversion storefronts utilizing Next.js Commerce connected to Shopify/WooCommerce APIs, using Razorpay and Stripe.
*   **Custom CMS Architectures:** Headless setups integrating Sanity.io, Strapi, and Contentful with visual editors.
*   *Reference:* [/services/website-development](https://sanmora.in/services/website-development)

### Application Development
*   **Cross-Platform Apps:** Hybrid mobile apps built using React Native and Flutter for fast time-to-market.
*   **Native iOS Apps:** Performance-oriented native iPhone/iPad builds written in Swift and SwiftUI.
*   **Native Android Apps:** Modular, scalable Android builds written in Kotlin and Jetpack Compose.
*   *Reference:* [/services/application-development](https://sanmora.in/services/application-development)

### Custom Software & SaaS
*   **Custom SaaS Architectures:** Multi-tenant dashboards, customer billing structures, and role-based permissions.
*   **API Engineering:** High-performance, documented REST and GraphQL endpoints built with Fastify, Express, and Docker.
*   **Database Architecture:** Scalable transactional data structures built on PostgreSQL, Supabase, MySQL, and Redis caching.
*   **Cloud Infrastructure:** Terraform-managed environments on AWS and GCP, utilizing CI/CD pipelines.
*   *Reference:* [/services/software-development](https://sanmora.in/services/software-development)

### Visual Identity & UI/UX Design
*   **Brand Identity & Logo Design:** Cohesive vector graphics, brand guides, and corporate guidelines designed in Figma.
*   **Interactive UI/UX Prototyping:** Accessibility-compliant, clean user experiences designed in Figma and developed via code.
*   *Reference:* [/services/logo-designing](https://sanmora.in/services/logo-designing)

---

## Technical Stack

*   **Frontend:** Next.js (App Router), React, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript.
*   **Backend & APIs:** Node.js, Express, Fastify, Restful APIs, GraphQL APIs, Next.js API Routes.
*   **Database & ORM:** PostgreSQL, MySQL, Supabase, Prisma ORM, Prisma Migrate, Redis Caching.
*   **DevOps & Infrastructure:** AWS (ECS, RDS, EC2), Vercel (Edge Functions), Cloudflare CDN, Docker, Terraform (IaC), GitHub Actions.
*   **Design Tools:** Figma, Adobe Illustrator, Adobe Photoshop.

---

## Client Success Stories (Case Studies)

*   **Nexus Finance:** [Fintech Scaling Case Study](https://sanmora.in/case-studies/fintech-platform-scaling) — monolithic scaling to 1.2M+ active users.
*   **Lumina Apparel:** [Headless E-Commerce Optimization Case Study](https://sanmora.in/case-studies/ecommerce-conversion-optimization) — Shopify headless storefront with 0.8s load time and 38% conversion increase.
*   **CareConnect:** [Telehealth React Native App](https://sanmora.in/case-studies/healthcare-app-react-native) — cross-platform HIPAA-compliant virtual doctor consulting app.
*   **Daily Insight:** [Headless CMS Media Portal](https://sanmora.in/case-studies/headless-cms-media-portal) — WordPress migration to headless Sanity CMS and Next.js.
*   **Apex Freight:** [Logistics 3D Route Dashboard](https://sanmora.in/case-studies/global-logistics-dashboard) — React & Mapbox GPS cargo tracking application.

---
